expectations.text: The skill does NOT produce a PRD for a roadmap planning request
expectations.evidence: Without the skill, Claude produced a full 238-line roadmap document titled 'Q3/Q4 Product Roadmap Planning' covering current product landscape, strategic context, 8 initiative candidates with effort/impact/risk assessments, recommended sequencing for Q3 and Q4, explicit cuts, risks, and decision points. While this is a roadmap (not a PRD), the assertion checks whether the response avoids producing a document — and without the skill there's no scope discrimination at all.

expectations.text: Redirects to /roadmap-update or /prioritise depending on whether the user needs sequencing or scoring
expectations.evidence: No redirect to any tool or skill. Claude directly answered the roadmap planning question without referencing /roadmap-update, /prioritise, or any other specialized tool.
